@graph.name: ProbKnow Ontology and Nanopublication Examples
@graph.description: The ProbKnow ontology (T-Box) for representing scientific papers, the discrete claims extracted from them, the hypotheses those claims cluster into, attached economic predictions, and the probabilistic assessments a panel of models assign to each claim across frontier-science domains. Bundled with signed nanopublication examples (the current pk:/pkr: form plus an earlier published urn: wave that is live on the network), ready-to-run SPARQL queries, and a legacy-to-current compatibility crosswalk. Produced by the PKG Aggregator (probknow.com).

@graph.name: ProbKnow ontology (Turtle)
@graph.description: The OWL ontology / T-Box: classes, properties, the probabilistic-evaluation layer, and the legacy urn:-to-pk: equivalence crosswalk that keeps already-published nanopublications queryable.

@graph.name: ProbKnow: Probabilistic Knowledge Graph Ontology for Frontier Science
Ontology reference (human-readable)
@graph.description: Human-readable T-Box reference: classes, properties, design notes, and the legacy-to-canonical crosswalk.

@graph.name: Nanopublication example (current pk:/pkr: form)
@graph.description: A signed nanopublication produced by the current probknow signing pipeline, using the pk:/pkr: ontology. Valid trusty-URI nanopublication (RA hash + RSA-SHA256 signature).

@graph.name: Nanopublication example (legacy urn: wave, live on network)
@graph.description: A signed nanopublication from an earlier published wave, live on the nanopub network and resolvable at https://w3id.org/np/RANokmO9j8qIxyBdirmYlJ_zKFtlQiWgeA86AavxiO-is. Uses legacy urn:pkg: terms, bridged to pk: by the ontology crosswalk.
